title: n8n API: Extract workflow names with jq
body:
curl -X GET "{{n8n-url}}/api/v1/workflows" \
  -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: {{api-key}}" \
  -H "Accept: application/json" | jq '.data[] | {id: .id, name: .name, active: .active}'
description: Extract specific workflow fields using jq - create custom reports (docs.n8n.io/api/api-reference/)
